evidently.feature.variationobject.CfnAbo: This structure contains the name and variation value of one variation of a feature. It can contain only one of the following parameters: `BooleanValue`, `DoubleValue`, `LongValue` or `StringValue`.

evidently.feature.variationobject.Boolea.Description: The value assigned to this variation, if the variation type is boolean.

evidently.feature.variationobject.Double.Description: The value assigned to this variation, if the variation type is a double.

evidently.feature.variationobject.LongVa.Description: The value assigned to this variation, if the variation type is a long.

evidently.feature.variationobject.String.Description: The value assigned to this variation, if the variation type is a string.

evidently.feature.variationobject.Variat.Description: A name for the variation. It can include up to 127 characters.
